title: psoralidium lanceolatum var. stenophyllum
intro: Psoralidium lanceolatum var. stenophyllum, also known as greasewood or silver greasewood, is a perennial shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory, as well as its diuretic properties. The health benefits of Psoralidium lanceolatum var. stenophyllum include treating kidney stones, relieving arthritis symptoms, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
